name: infa-cdgc-mcp-server
title: Informatica CDGC Metadata Search MCP Server
summary: Informatica (A Salesforce company) MCP server exposing CLAIRE-powered CDGC metadata for AI agents to perform semantic asset search, lineage, and compliance checks via standardized MCP tools and natural language prompts
description: Informatica (A Salesforce company)'s MCP server exposing CLAIRE-powered CDGC metadata for AI agents to perform semantic asset search, lineage, and compliance checks via standardized MCP tools and natural language prompts.

useCases.name: Discover Enterprise Assets
useCases.description: Search the Informatica Data Catalog for tables, files, and reports based on business terms or technical names

useCases.name: Retrieve Asset Details
useCases.description: Fetch comprehensive metadata including physical paths, system types, and detailed business descriptions.

useCases.name: Governance Auditing
useCases.description: Quickly identify the business owner, classification (PII, Sensitive), and certification status of any data asset before it is used.

idmcOauthCdgc.description: Authenticate using Microsoft Entra ID OAuth2.
